ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, exhibition) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee or officiating crew */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Player's current injury status (e.g., healthy, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being tracked */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed in the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (if the player is a goalkeeper) */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances (if the player is a defender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Team's social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Coaching certifications or qualifications */,
  "email" TEXT /* Coach's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Coach's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
